I always thought it was just higher, uncompressed data, so it makes it easier to change later; I didn't realize until now that that's because it's just the information from the sensor displayed in a way that you can see as a photo. And that's really cool! Thanks, Marques!

videoTitle: iPhone 17 | My Review | Best iPhone Evaaa !!! | Sale King !! | Malayalam
comment: Bro, there’s something most people don’t realize about iPhone storage — screenshots actually take up a lot of space. Each screenshot can be around 8–10 MP in size, which means if you’ve got 1,000 of them, that’s roughly 10–12 GB of storage gone just for screenshots! Most people assume a screenshot is just 1–2 MB, but on iPhones, they’re much larger. You can check it yourself by copying all your screenshots to a computer and checking the total folder size — it’s pretty surprising.

videoTitle: I Am Returning My iPhone 17 Pro | 10 Days Review | Malayalam
comment: Issues with this video 1) Durability The iPhone 16 which you told to be strong durable is made up of the aluminum body similar to the iPhone 17 and iPhone 17 pro series. So, iPhone 17 pro should also have the same durability standards to your iPhone 16. But, scratches will be an issue on the 17 pro's plateau due to the sharp edges it has. 2) Charging You do not need to buy Apple's 40W charger to reach the claimed charging speeds, even with a non-AVS spec charger like Samsung's 45W charger, you can reach that same charging speeds. You can refer to GSMArena's 17 Pro Review, in its Charging Speed portion. It talks about this. Apart from these, the other points stay valid and the iPhone 17 is plenty enough for 99% of the people.
